name: Gujerati-Style Cabbage with Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the cabbage and shred it finely.
2. Grate the carrots.
3. Cut the green chili into thin strips.
4. Heat oil in a casserole-type pot over medium-high heat.
5. When hot, add the asafetida.
6. Immediately afterwards, add the mustard seeds.
7. When the mustard seeds begin to pop, stir in the red chili.
8. When the chili darkens slightly, add the cabbage, carrots, and green chili strips.
9. Reduce the heat to medium and stir the vegetables for 30 seconds.
10. Add salt, sugar, and cilantro; stir until combined.
11. Cook for 5 minutes.
12. Add lemon juice and serve.
